title: RED CROSS DISASTER SERVICES - 211info
text: CENTRAL AND EASTERN OREGON CHAPTER RED CROSS DISASTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides disaster services focused on meeting people's immediate needs resulting from disasters, such as shelter, food, health, and mental health services. 815 SW Bond Street Suite 110 Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm, 24 hours per day / 7 days per week during an emergency Email (503) 284-1234 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 382-2142 Main phone Main phone (503) 284-1234 Hotline (888) 680-1455 Disaster Response Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, Gilliam, Grant, Harney, Hood River, Jefferson, Morrow, Sherman, Umatilla, Wasco and Wheeler Counties and the Warm Springs Reservation SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Disaster Related Clothing/Emergency Supplies Disaster Related Shelter Services Disaster Relief/Recovery Organizations General Disaster Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH AND SAFETY COURSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTRAL AND EASTERN OREGON CHAPTER
